normalization.notes: Store Gothic script text in NFC and preserve transliteration and edition notes. Do not normalize Gothic letters to Greek or Latin lookalikes.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Gothic letters, transliteration labels, sacred-name context, manuscript punctuation, and selected word chunks
segmentation.notes: Gothic is encoded and left-to-right, but available text is mostly biblical and edition-dependent. Treat manuscript punctuation and sacred vocabulary as review-gated.
